γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator ι₂ l₃ φ)

          is_iso.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
rassociator ι₂ l₃ φ • (ι₂ ◃ (l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₁)) =
rassociator ι₂ l₃ φ • (ι₂ ◃ (l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₂))

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
(ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) • rassociator ι₂ l₃ ψ =
(ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₂) • rassociator ι₂ l₃ ψ

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₁ = ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₂

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell (γ₂ ▹ φ)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
(γ₂ ▹ φ) • (ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) =
(γ₂ ▹ φ) • (ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell (γ₂ ▹ φ)

          
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell γ₂

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
(γ₂ ▹ φ) • (ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) =
(γ₂ ▹ φ) • (ι₂ · l₃ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
(l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) • (γ₂ ▹ ψ) =
(l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂) • (γ₂ ▹ ψ)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁ = l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃

γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)

  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂

              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
