                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ • (l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) =
lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ • (l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ)

          is_iso.
        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ • (l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) =
lassociator l₂ κ₂ φ • (l₂ · κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
(l₂ ◃ (κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁)) • lassociator l₂ κ₂ ψ =
(l₂ ◃ (κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)) • lassociator l₂ κ₂ ψ

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
l₂ ◃ (κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁) = l₂ ◃ (κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
ζ₁, ζ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₁ = κ₂ ◃ pr1 ζ₂

        exact (pr22 ζ₁ @ !(pr22 ζ₂)).
    Qed.

    Let Hr₁ : @left_adjoint_equivalence (op1_bicat B) _ _ r₁
      := bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
           _
           (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (_ ,, Hl₁))).

    Let Hr₂ : @left_adjoint_equivalence (op1_bicat B) _ _ r₂
      := bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
           _
           (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (_ ,, Hl₂))).

    Let α' : ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
           (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
           (lassociator _ _ _
            • ((γ₁')^-1 ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ lassociator _ _ _)
            • (_ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ _))
            • (_ ◃ lunitor φ)
            • α
            • (_ ◃ linvunitor ψ)
            • (_ ◃ (ε₃^-1 ▹ _))
            • (_ ◃ rassociator _ _ _)
            • lassociator _ _ _
            • (γ₁' ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _).

    Let β' : ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
           (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
           (lassociator _ _ _
            • ((γ₂')^-1 ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ lassociator _ _ _)
            • (_ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ _))
            • (_ ◃ lunitor _)
            • β
            • (_ ◃ linvunitor _)
            • (_ ◃ (ε₃^-1 ▹ _))
            • (_ ◃ rassociator _ _ _)
            • lassociator _ _ _
            • (γ₂' ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _).

    Definition has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell
      : φ ==> ψ
      := linvunitor _
         • (ε₃^-1 ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (ε₃ ▹ _)
         • lunitor _.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
κ₁ ◃ has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell =
α

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
κ₁ ◃ has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell =
α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
κ₁
◃ ((((((linvunitor φ • (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ φ))
       • rassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
      • (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
     • lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ) • (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • lunitor ψ) =
α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
((((((κ₁ ◃ linvunitor φ) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ φ)))
    • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
   • (κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) = α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(κ₁ ◃ linvunitor φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ φ))
   • ((κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
      • ((κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
         • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
            • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))))) =
α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
• ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
   • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker κ₁
   (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker κ₁
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker φ
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv ε₃))) ^-1
   • ((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker κ₁
         (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor φ)) ^-1 • α))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
• ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
   • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ))) =
(κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)) • ((κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ) • α))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂

κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂

              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
   • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
      • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))) =
rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
   • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)) • ((κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ) • α)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
   • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
      • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))) =
rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
• ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
   • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)) • ((κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ) • α)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁

  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(((rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
   • (κ₁ ◃ (r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
