ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
((((κ₁ · r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
   • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
is_invertible_2cell (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
• (((((κ₁ · r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
      • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
     • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • 
    (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ))) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)) =
(γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
• ((((rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
      • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • 
     (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁

  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
is_invertible_2cell (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
• (((((κ₁ · r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
      • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
     • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)) =
(γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
• ((((rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
      • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
    • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(((((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
    • (κ₁ · r₃ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
   • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(((((r₁ · ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
    • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ))
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
• ((((((r₁ · ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
       • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ))
      • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
     • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • 
    (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ))) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)) =
lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
• ((((((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
      • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • 
     (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ

            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)

            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)

        is_iso.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧

Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧

ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)

ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)

ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂

                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁

             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) •

        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))

      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))

    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))

    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)

• ((((((r₁ · ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β')
       • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ))
      • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
     • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)) =
lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
• ((((((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
      • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
    • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
     • (r₁ · ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
    • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ) • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ))
    • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
((((((r₁ ◃ (ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
     • lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
  • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)))
• (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ) =
(((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ) • (γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ))
    • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
   • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)) • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)))
 • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(r₁ ◃ (ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
• (lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)
   • ((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)
      • (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ)
         • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
            • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))))) =
lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
• ((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
   • (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
      • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
         • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)) • ((κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ) • α)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(r₁ ◃ (ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
• (lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)
   • ((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)
      • (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ)
         • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
            • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
?b =
lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · φ)
• ((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · φ)
   • (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ)
      • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ)
         • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ)) • ((κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ) • α)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, c ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
Hr₁:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₁,, Hl₁))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₁
Hr₂:= bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence_to_op1_bicat_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (pr1 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂)))
  (pr2 (inv_adjequiv (l₂,, Hl₂))): left_adjoint_equivalence r₂
α':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₁)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₁ ι₁ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₁ ◃ lunitor φ)) • α)
        • (κ₁ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₁ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₁' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₁ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₁ · (l₃ · ψ)
β':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hr₂)
  ((((((((((((lassociator r₂ ι₂ (...)
              • (... ▹ ...))
             • rassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · φ))
            • (κ₂ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ φ))
           • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ φ))) • 
          (κ₂ ◃ lunitor φ)) • β)
        • (κ₂ ◃ linvunitor ψ))
       • (κ₂ ◃ (ε₃ ^-1 ▹ ψ)))
      • (κ₂ ◃ rassociator r₃ l₃ ψ))
     • lassociator κ₂ r₃ (l₃ · ψ))
    • (γ₂' ▹ l₃ · ψ)) • rassociator r₂ ι₂ (l₃ · ψ)): ι₂ · (l₃ · φ) ==> ι₂ · (l₃ · ψ)
(r₁ ◃ (ι₁ ◃ bincoprod_ump_2cell Hp α' β'))
• (lassociator r₁ ι₁ (l₃ · ψ)
   • ((γ₁' ^-1 ▹ l₃ · ψ)
      • (rassociator κ₁ r₃ (l₃ · ψ)
         • ((κ₁ ◃ lassociator r₃ l₃ ψ)
            • ((κ₁ ◃ (ε₃ ▹ ψ)) • (κ₁ ◃ lunitor ψ)))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
