              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ γ = α
   × bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ ◃ γ = β)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ γ = α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ ◃ γ = β

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ γ = α
   × bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ ◃ γ = β)
 exact (has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_unique α β).
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ γ = α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ ◃ γ = β
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
φ ==> ψ
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ ?pr1 = α
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>

β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>

(λ _ : bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ ◃ ?pr1 = α,
 bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ ◃ ?pr1 = β) 
  ?pr10

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>

φ ==> ψ
 exact (has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell α β).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂
◃ has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell α
    β = α
 exact (has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_inl α β).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
c: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ cone₂, c ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂ · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂ · ψ
(λ _ : bincoprod_cocone_inl cone₂
       ◃ has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell
           α β = α,
 bincoprod_cocone_inr cone₂
 ◃ has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell α
     β = β)
  (has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_inl α
     β)
 exact (has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_inr α β).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
has_bincoprod_ump cone₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
has_bincoprod_ump cone₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
bincoprod_ump_1 cone₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
(λ _ : bincoprod_ump_1 cone₂, bincoprod_ump_2 cone₂)
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
bincoprod_ump_1 cone₂
 exact has_bincoprod_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, p, y₁, y₂, q: B
ι₁: B ⟦ x₁, p ⟧
ι₂: B ⟦ x₂, p ⟧
cone₁:= make_bincoprod_cocone p ι₁ ι₂: bincoprod_cocone x₁ x₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump cone₁
κ₁: B ⟦ y₁, q ⟧
κ₂: B ⟦ y₂, q ⟧
cone₂:= make_bincoprod_cocone q κ₁ κ₂: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
l₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
l₃: B ⟦ p, q ⟧
Hl₁: left_adjoint_equivalence l₁
Hl₂: left_adjoint_equivalence l₂
Hl₃: left_adjoint_equivalence l₃
γ₁: invertible_2cell (l₁ · κ₁) (ι₁ · l₃)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (l₂ · κ₂) (ι₂ · l₃)
r₁:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₁: B ⟦ y₁, x₁ ⟧
η₁:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (l₁ · r₁)
ε₁:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₁: invertible_2cell (r₁ · l₁) (id₁ y₁)
r₂:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₂: B ⟦ y₂, x₂ ⟧
η₂:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₂) (l₂ · r₂)
ε₂:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₂: invertible_2cell (r₂ · l₂) (id₁ y₂)
r₃:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl₃: B ⟦ q, p ⟧
η₃:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (id₁ p) (l₃ · r₃)
ε₃:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl₃: invertible_2cell (r₃ · l₃) (id₁ q)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₁ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₁ l₁
           (κ₁ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₁
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₁ κ₁
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₁)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₁ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₁)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₁ · r₃) (r₁ · ι₁)
γ₂':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (κ₂ · r₃) (inv_of_invertible_2cell ε₂))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell r₂ l₂
           (κ₂ · r₃))
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₂
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lassociator_invertible_2cell l₂ κ₂
                 r₃)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell r₃
                    γ₂)
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rassociator_invertible_2cell
                       ι₂ l₃ r₃)
                    (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                       (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂
                        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                        η₃))
                       (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        ι₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (κ₂ · r₃) (r₂ · ι₂)
(λ _ : bincoprod_ump_1 cone₂, bincoprod_ump_2 cone₂)
  has_bincoprod_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence
 exact has_bincoprod_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence.
  Defined.
End CoproductEquivalence.
